title: Elytra End
description: A Better and More Stylish Elytra end theme
body:
![in game](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39dad2e6e7dc34cbacb1497bc668db1f51225772.png)
# Enhanced Elytra Visuals
**A fresh, polished look for your wings!**

This resource pack gives the Elytra a complete visual overhaul. It updates both the **item icon** in your inventory and the **3D model** on your back to look cleaner and more detailed.

## Key Features
* **Complete Redesign:** New textures for both the item and the worn model.
* **Plug & Play:** No extra mods required! You **do not** need OptiFine or CIT.
* **Vanilla Friendly:** Works on any server, modpack, or single-player world automatically.
